title: 'Create new item' modal window for boards
excerpt:

posts.author: kasperhusted (Kasper Husted)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the New item and Add item buttons in ‘My Work’, that allow you to enter all data/columns for your new item in a modal window before creating it.

For boards with a lot of columns, it makes it possible to check if everything is in order before you unleash an item in a board (and trigger whatever automations you might have etc.).

image597×1061 37.1 KB

Would it be possible to implement the same feature within the boards as well?

The regular function where all new items are added to the bottom of the top group isn’t always ideal, especially when you have a lot of items and a lot of filters/sorting applied to a board view.

I get a lot of complaints from users in my team, that they are “losing” items they have created because the items are created where they can’t see them.

Filters, sorting and automations can make an item “dance” around the board as you are editing it, meaning you have to keep an eye on where it lands - this becomes difficult, if you have a group with 30+ items.

In my experience, this is a source of great confusion for new users (although they do get a hang of it with experience).
